agency: NYC Department of Consumer and Worker Protection (DCWP)
description: Free tax preparation services for NYC residents. Helps you file federal and state returns and claim credits like EITC, CTC, and NY State credits.

eligibility.income_limit_note: Families earning $85,000 or less. Single filers earning approximately $56,000 or less may also qualify depending on the site.
eligibility.notes: Income threshold may change each tax season. Check the source URL for current limits.

apply_in_person: Visit a Free Tax Prep site. Find locations at the URL above or call 311.
how_to_apply: Visit a Free Tax Prep site in person or file online through NYC Free Tax Prep partners. Find sites at nyc.gov/taxprep or call 311.
